title: Attack of the Bandit Cats
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his family are captured by pirate cats but outsmart them with a clever trick and sail home with stolen treasure! 🏴‍☠️

q.en: Why were angry mice crowding outside Geronimo's office chanting 'We want Stilton!'?
q.zh: 为什么愤怒的老鼠们挤在杰罗尼摩的办公室外，高喊着“我们要斯蒂尔顿”？

options.en: The new Yellow Pages listed all the wrong phone numbers
options.zh: 新出版的黄页电话簿里所有电话号码都印错了
他把办公室的钥匙弄丢了

options.en: His books were completely sold out according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他写的书全部卖光了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The newspaper was printed too late

explain.en: Geronimo's company printed the Yellow Pages with every phone number wrong, so a furious crowd gathered outside and even burned the directories.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩的公司印出的黄页电话簿里每一个号码都是错的，愤怒的人群聚集在门外，甚至把电话簿堆起来烧掉了。

q.en: What did Cousin Trap buy at the flea market to carry the family across the ocean?
q.zh: 表哥特拉普在跳蚤市场买了什么，用来载着一家人漂洋过海？

options.en: A folding hang glider according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一架折叠滑翔机（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A hot-air balloon with purple and yellow dots
options.zh: 一个紫色带黄色圆点的热气球

explain.en: Trap bought a cheap hot-air balloon at the flea market; Geronimo complained it looked like a giant prune with freckles.
explain.zh: 特拉普在跳蚤市场买了一只便宜的热气球；杰罗尼摩抱怨它看起来像个长了雀斑的大李子干。

q.en: How many days did the mice float in the balloon before they reached the Claw Islands?
q.zh: 老鼠们坐着气球飞行了多少天，才抵达猫爪群岛？

options.en: Twenty days according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 二十天（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: They left at dawn and on the eleventh day at noon they finally caught sight of the Claw Islands.
explain.zh: 他们黎明出发，到了第十一天的中午才终于远远望见了猫爪群岛。

q.en: What was the name of the pirate cats' silver ship?
q.zh: 海盗猫那艘银光闪闪的大船叫什么名字？

options.en: The Golden Hook according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 金钩号（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The pirate ship was called The Silver Claw; except for its black sails, the whole ship was covered in polished silver that shone in the sun.
explain.zh: 那艘海盗船名叫银爪号；除了黑色的帆，整艘船都裹着擦得发亮的银子，在阳光下闪闪发光。

q.en: What made the pirate leader, the Black Bandit, easy to recognize?
q.zh: 海盗首领“黑盗贼”有什么让人一眼就能认出的特征？

options.en: His right paw was a silver hook
He was covered in orange fur
He wore a heavy gold crown according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他戴着一顶沉甸甸的金王冠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Black Bandit was a black cat whose right paw was a horrifying silver hook, and one eye was yellow while the other was green.
explain.zh: 黑盗贼是一只黑猫，他的右爪是一只吓人的银钩，而且一只眼睛是黄色、另一只是绿色。

q.en: Why did the bandit cats eat only snails instead of fish?
q.zh: 为什么强盗猫只吃蜗牛，而不吃鱼？

options.en: They did not know how to cook fish according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们不会做鱼（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The Black Bandit was allergic to fish

explain.en: The Black Bandit was allergic to fish, so he forbade the crew from eating any; they survived on snails, snails, and more snails.
explain.zh: 黑盗贼对鱼过敏，所以禁止船员吃鱼；他们只能靠蜗牛、蜗牛，还是蜗牛过日子。

q.en: Who thought of the clever plan to file through the prison bars and escape?
q.zh: 是谁想出了锯断牢栏、逃出监狱的妙计？

options.en: Geronimo, the uncle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 叔叔杰罗尼摩（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Young Benjamin got the idea from a book about Fearless Frank the Adventure Mouse, then used the Swiss army knife Geronimo gave him to file the bars.
explain.zh: 小本杰明是从一本写“冒险鼠无畏弗兰克”的书里得到灵感的，然后用杰罗尼摩送给他的瑞士军刀锯开了铁栏。

q.en: What did Benjamin use to trick the ship's compass and steer toward Ho-hum Island?
q.zh: 本杰明用了什么去骗过船上的罗盘，让船驶向呼呼岛？

options.zh: 他那块奶酪形状的冰箱贴磁铁

options.en: A gold coin from the treasure according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 宝藏里的一枚金币（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Benjamin's lucky charm was a refrigerator magnet shaped like cheese; Thea stuck it to the compass so the needle pointed to Ho-hum Island.
explain.zh: 本杰明的幸运符是一块奶酪形状的冰箱贴磁铁；西娅把它贴在罗盘上，让指针指向了呼呼岛。

q.en: What secret hobby did the scary Black Bandit enjoy in his free time?
q.zh: 令人害怕的黑盗贼在空闲时，有什么秘密爱好？

options.zh: 十字绣，缝制花团锦簇的枕头

options.en: Cooking fancy snail dinners according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 烹饪精致的蜗牛大餐（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo found dozens of flowery homemade pillows in the Bandit's room, revealing his secret hobby was needlepoint.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在黑盗贼的房间里发现了好几十个手工缝制的花枕头，从而揭开了他爱做十字绣的秘密爱好。

q.en: What famous treasure did the mice find hidden under the Black Bandit's bed?
q.zh: 老鼠们在黑盗贼的床下发现了什么有名的宝物？

options.en: A golden king's crown according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一顶国王的金王冠（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The legendary silver quarter of Mouse Island
options.zh: 老鼠岛传说中的银质二角五分硬币

explain.en: Under a locked trapdoor they found the legendary silver quarter, the first coin ever minted on Mouse Island, dated 1458, with the motto 'Rodents Be Smart, Follow Your Heart!'
explain.zh: 在带锁的暗门下，他们找到了传说中的银质二角五分硬币——那是1458年老鼠岛上铸造的第一枚硬币，背面刻着“聪明老鼠，跟随内心”的格言。
